# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that caches dependencies and build outputs to speed up the CI pipeline. Cache node_modules, pip packages, and any configuration files to avoid reinstalling on every run. Include environment-specific configs in the cache for convenience.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI Workflow

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - '*'
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - '*'

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Cache node modules
        uses: actions/cache@v2
        with:
          path: ~/.npm
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-node-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-node-
      
      - name: Cache pip packages
        uses: actions/cache@v2
        with:
          path: ~/.cache/pip
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-pip-${{ hashFiles('**/pip-lock.json') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-pip-

      - name: Cache configurations
        uses: actions/cache@v2
        with:
          path: ~/.config
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-config-${{ hashFiles('**/config.json') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-config-

      - name: Use Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v2
        with:
          node-version: '14'
      
      - name: Install Dependencies
        run: |
          npm ci
          pip install -r requirements.txt

      - name: Build
        run: npm run build
